positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed central emblem featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. The composition should depict giant, symmetrical forest leaves, intertwining gothic vine patterns, and abstract glowing geometric constellations integrated into the natural structure. Use strong silhouettes and high contrast. Style: Neo-Victorian botanical engraving meets modern vector art. Palette: Deep midnight indigo, ethereal cyan, vibrant neon lime, and accents of metallic gold. Clean, crisp lines, intricate cross-hatching texture, perfect for a repeating, seamless apparel print. Centered composition, symmetrical balance, illuminated from within.
